verse_text: But the word is very near you, in your mouth, in your heart, and in your hands, that you may do it.

links.context: The law may be kept by obedience (Lv 18:5) and by faith ([[DEU.30:14]]). Obedience without faith cannot bring anyone to righteousness. Yet faith, even apart from the law, can bring a person to righteousness, because Jesus Christ supersedes the law.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
